metadata.description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite: 6 skills + 9 commands. Explicit adaptive, no-English, and SDK-v3 workflow ETA controls, external review, and read-only Codex delegation; optional runtimes fail closed when prerequisites are absent.

plugins.name: oh-my-gjc
plugins.description: oh-my-gajaecode — focused Gajae Code suite. Skills: adaptive-response, no-english, time-left, extragoal, insane-review, lazycodex-gjc. Commands: /omg, /omg:setup, /omg:gate, /omg:gate-always, /omg:no-english, /omg:time-left, /omg:fable, /omg:insane-review, /omg:lazycodex-gjc. The three presentation/ETA skills require explicit commands; time-left uses the read-only GJC SDK v3 bus. LazyCodex stays read-only and prerequisite-bound. models.yml remains untouched.
